SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class BusinessHourController

java.lang.Object
server.controller.BusinessHourController
public class BusinessHourController extends Object
Controller class responsible for managing the restaurant's business/opening hours. Handles retrieval, creation, deletion, and updates of operating times.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException
      Main handler for Business Hour requests. Routes the request based on the ActionType.
      Parameters:
      req - The request object.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • handleUpdate

      private void handleUpdate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
      Handles updates to business status (open/close). Note: Currently logic sends success message but logic is partial.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing the ID and action payload.
      client - The client connection.

    • handleDelete

      private void handleDelete(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException
      Deletes a specific opening hour entry based on the date.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing the Date payload.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • handleGetAll

      private void handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves all defined opening hours from the database.
      Parameters:
      req - The request object.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • handleSave

      private void handleSave(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Saves new opening hours or updates existing ones.
      Parameters:
      req - The request containing the OpeningHours object.
      client - The client connection.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • syncAllClients

      private void syncAllClients() throws SQLException
      Helper method to broadcast updated hours to all connected clients.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
